voices.name: Aaron
voices.description: Clear and professional male voice with confident delivery. Great for corporate content and presentations.

voices.name: Abigail
voices.description: Warm and approachable female voice with natural tone. Perfect for narration and conversational content.

voices.name: Anaya
voices.description: Dynamic and expressive female voice with rich emotional range. Ideal for storytelling and creative content.

voices.name: Andy
voices.description: Friendly and versatile male voice. The default Chatterbox voice, great for general-purpose TTS.

voices.name: Archer
voices.description: Strong and authoritative male voice with depth. Suited for documentaries and serious narration.

voices.name: Brian
voices.description: Laid-back and casual male voice with easygoing delivery. Works well for podcasts and informal content.

voices.name: Chloe
voices.description: Bright and energetic female voice with youthful enthusiasm. Great for social media and upbeat content.

voices.name: Dylan
voices.description: Smooth narrative male voice with engaging delivery. Excellent for audiobooks and long-form content.

voices.name: Emmanuel
voices.description: Deep and resonant male voice with gravitas. Perfect for trailers, promos, and dramatic content.

voices.name: Ethan
voices.description: Natural and conversational male voice. Ideal for tutorials, explainers, and casual narration.

voices.name: Evelyn
voices.description: Sophisticated and elegant female voice with refined delivery. Great for luxury brands and premium content.

voices.name: Gavin
voices.description: Energetic and dynamic male voice with enthusiasm. Perfect for gaming, sports, and high-energy content.

voices.name: Gordon
voices.description: Mature and seasoned male voice with wisdom. Suited for documentaries, history, and educational content.

voices.name: Ivan
voices.description: Commanding male voice with presence and power. Ideal for announcements and authoritative content.

voices.name: Laura
voices.description: Soothing and calming female voice with gentle delivery. Perfect for meditation, wellness, and ASMR.

voices.name: Lucy
voices.description: Lively and charismatic female voice with personality. Great for entertainment, ads, and engaging content.

voices.name: Madison
voices.description: Clear and articulate female voice with precision. Ideal for educational content and instructions.

voices.name: Marisol
voices.description: Vibrant and passionate female voice with energy. Works well for creative projects and storytelling.

voices.name: Meera
voices.description: Thoughtful and measured female voice with intelligence. Perfect for tech content, science, and analysis.

voices.name: Walter
voices.description: Classic announcer-style male voice with polish. Ideal for commercials, intros, and professional voiceovers.
